title: Hungary govt submits anti-graft bill to unlock EU funds
summary_full: Obtaining the funds was a top campaign pledge for Prime Minister Péter Magyar, a pro-EU conservative, who ousted Viktor Orbán from office in the April elections
summary_public: Obtaining the funds was a top campaign pledge for Prime Minister Péter Magyar, a pro-EU conservative, who ousted Viktor Orbán from office in the April elections

HU.label: positive
